title: Phippsia porsildii
taxonomy: Phippsia porsildii is a species of plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. It belongs to the genus Phippsia, which is a group of plants found in the Arctic regions. Phippsia porsildii is classified as a type of cushion plant, known for its unique growth habit. This classification places it within the order Caryophyllales, which includes other plants with similar characteristics. As a member of the Caryophyllaceae family, Phippsia porsildii is closely related to other plants such as Silene and Arenaria.
